scripts.build: npm run -w @workspace-todo-app/shared build && npm run -w @workspace-todo-app/data build && npm run -w @workspace-todo-app/functions build && npm run -w @workspace-todo-app/local-dev build && npm run -w @workspace-todo-app/frontend build
scripts.dev: rayfin up --exclude-services staticHosting,functions && npm run dev:local-services
scripts.dev:local-services: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run build:watch" "npm run dev:functions"
